Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class ButtonType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.ButtonType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ButtonType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for ButtonType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="ButtonType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="font" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}fontType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pos" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}posType"/>
         <element name="databinding" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}databindingType"/>
         <element name="kind" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}buttonKindType"/>
         <element name="text" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="useFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="hotkey" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}hotkeyType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="saveAction" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}saveActionType"/>
         <element name="utf8" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="workflowAction" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}workflowActionType"/>
         <element name="bitmap" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="style" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="exstyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="script" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}ScriptType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
